title: baseline prefers run summary
goal: 让 refresh-baseline 优先消费 run_summary.json，并仅在缺失时回退 current_summary。

acceptance.text: refresh-baseline loads run summary when available
refresh-baseline falls back to current_summary only when run summary is unavailable
docs describe baseline input priority clearly

key_updates: refresh-baseline now prefers run_summary.json over current_summary
decisions: baseline refresh input priority is run_summary first, current_summary fallback second
risks: fallback path still depends on current_summary when run_summary is absent
next_steps: decide whether summarize-current should also update run_summary more directly
